issue_title: fix(help-ui): help command does not print all the result in the large window
issue_body_preview:
The bug can be reproduced when the `this.terminal.rows` is more than `lineCount * 2 + 2`. Honestly, I failed to understand why it can happen, but replacing the last message with `this.print` will help.

**Before**

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/37064641/232635473-ba1386ee-16b2-4ca4-b
test_description_zh: 在一个较大的终端窗口（行数足够多）中运行 npkill 的帮助命令（--help 或 -h），观察帮助信息是否完整显示。
expected_result_zh: 帮助命令的所有内容（包括最后一行）应在大窗口终端中完整打印输出，不出现内容截断或缺失的情况。
